assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Sets up Saturday 2-6 AM maintenance window with --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific examples for Q4 2024 and Q1 2025 code freezes with --add-maintenance-exclusion commands

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Shows specific November audit exclusion with dates from 2024-11-01 to 2024-11-30 using --add-maintenance-exclusion commands

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'No upgrades exclusions are limited to 30 days each. For longer quarterly freezes, chain multiple exclusions with small gaps.'

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: This important distinction is not explained in the response; the response focuses on auto-upgrades but doesn't clarify that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended release channel and explains why it provides maximum control over upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time for all exclusion examples

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about the risk of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, which is important for security and support considerations
